title: Ethereum is still a good long-term buy, according data: Analyst
summary: Ethereum’s dominance in DeFi, stablecoins and staking is strengthening the long-term ETH accumulation thesis, despite it’s 28% price decline in 2026.

title: India Raises Diesel, Gasoline Prices for Third Time in Eight Days
summary: India’s state-run refiners raised retail prices again of diesel and gasoline on Saturday to help processors cut losses on discounted sales and to control a spike in demand.

title: Xi Urges Chinese Authorities to Curb Accidents After Mine Blast
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping urged authorities nationwide to step up efforts to curb major industrial accidents following a deadly gas explosion at a coal mine in northern Shanxi province, underscoring persistent safety risks in mining and heavy industry.
